_comment: Customizes the phone-ping hook messages. ping_notify.ps1 reads this; if the file is missing or invalid it falls back to built-in defaults (so a bad edit can't silence pings). Keys: PreToolUse = the question ping, Notification = the idle-60s ping, default = any other event. title = phone heading, body = line text, tag = ntfy emoji name (e.g. question, hourglass, robot, bell, warning, white_check_mark).

PreToolUse.title: Claude has a question
PreToolUse.body: Claude is asking you to choose
